members.name: CommonArgs
members.comment: Manages common argument structures; owned by the module; ensures consistent initialization and cleanup.

members.name: parseCommonArgs
members.signature: fn parseCommonArgs(args: []const []const u8, positional_buf: *std.ArrayListUnmanaged([]const u8), allocator: std.mem.Allocator) -> CommonArgs
members.comment:
Parse a flat args slice (excluding argv[0]) into a `CommonArgs`.
Positional arguments are returned as a sub-slice of `args`; the caller
must keep `args` alive for the lifetime of the returned struct.

Unknown flags are skipped (permissive mode for command-specific flags).
A flag that requires a value but is the last arg produces `error.MissingValue`.

members.name: parseCommonArgs: model and api-url with set flags
parseCommonArgs: unknown flags are skipped (permissive mode)
parseCommonArgs: missing value for -m returns error
parseCommonArgs: defaults when no args given
